description: Locations researched during curation that were not added as candidates. Every location researched must appear here or in a candidate file.

rejectedLocations.name: Katy Trail – Defiance Trailhead
rejectedLocations.rejectionReason: Exact duplicate of existing candidate:trail:st-charles-county:katy-trail-defiance — same coordinates and trailhead access point.

rejectedLocations.name: Katy Trail – St. Charles Trailhead
rejectedLocations.address: 500 S Riverside Dr, St. Charles, MO 63301
rejectedLocations.rejectionReason: Same address (500 S Riverside Dr) as existing candidate:trail:st-charles-county:frontier-park-trail. Different name for the same trailhead access point.

rejectedLocations.name: Wentzville Recreation Center (WREC)
rejectedLocations.rejectionReason: Same physical building as Wentzville Recreation Center (candidate:gym:st-charles-county:wentzville-recreation-center). Keeping the gym entry as the primary record.

rejectedLocations.name: Kirkwood Community Center – Fitness & Gym
rejectedLocations.rejectionReason: Same physical building as Kirkwood Community Center (candidate:community-center:st-louis-county:kirkwood-community-center). Keeping the community-center entry as the primary record.

rejectedLocations.name: The Pointe at Ballwin Commons – Community Recreation
rejectedLocations.rejectionReason: Same physical building as The Pointe at Ballwin Commons (candidate:gym:st-louis-county:the-pointe-at-ballwin). Keeping the gym entry as the primary record.

rejectedLocations.name: St. Charles County Kinetic Park – Youth Activity Center
rejectedLocations.address: 7801 Town Square Ave, Dardenne Prairie, MO 63368
rejectedLocations.rejectionReason: Facility name indicates youth-focused programming ('Youth Activity Center'). Excluded pending human review to confirm whether adult-only or mixed-use access is available.

rejectedLocations.name: Laumeier Sculpture Park
rejectedLocations.rejectionReason: Same location as candidate:park:st-louis-county:laumeier-sculpture-park. Park is the primary use; museum category entry is redundant.
